nasb.text: When they heard it, they began to go out one by one, beginning with the older ones, and He was left alone, and the woman, where she was, in the center of the court.

esv.text: But when they heard it, they went away one by one, beginning with the older ones, and Jesus was left alone with the woman standing before him.

cnv.text: 他們聽了這話，就從年老的開始，一個一個地都離開了，留下的只有耶穌和那個還站在那裡的婦人。

ccb.text: 他们听了这句话，就从老到少一个一个地走了，只剩下耶稣和那个女人在那里。

csbs.text: 他们听了这话，从年长的开始，一个接一个地走开了。最后，只剩下耶稣和那站在中间的妇人。
